summary.name: IvySets Evidence-Based Market Regime
summary.trade_permission: New long trades allowed if ticker is Eligible.
summary.primary_reason: broad trend and risk modules permit normal exposure

modules.title: Market Trend
modules.decision_impact: Broad trend permits normal long exposure if other risk modules agree.

modules.title: Volatility / Risk Budget
modules.decision_impact: Volatility permits normal planned position size.
modules.formula: 20D realized volatility, VIX percentile, and SPY 63D drawdown.

modules.title: Credit Stress
modules.decision_impact: Credit module excluded; FRED source unavailable.
modules.formula: High-yield OAS current level, 3Y z-score, 20-observation change.

modules.title: Financial Conditions
modules.decision_impact: Financial conditions excluded; FRED source unavailable.

modules.title: Options Crowding
modules.decision_impact: Options module excluded; Cboe data unavailable.

modules.title: Retail Sentiment Context
modules.decision_impact: Retail sentiment excluded; AAII values could not be validated.

modules.title: Long-Term Valuation
modules.decision_impact: Valuation context excluded; CAPE source unavailable.
modules.formula: Shiller CAPE current value and historical percentile.

watchlist.next_step: Eligible for planned setup, subject to personal entry rules and risk limits.
Eligible for planned setup, subject to personal entry rules and risk limits.
Research only; require technical repair or smaller entry size.
Eligible for planned setup, subject to personal entry rules and risk limits.
Wait for price to repair trend and relative strength before considering entry.

watchlist.reason: below 200DMA; underperforming SPY over 63D; elevated volatility
watchlist.next_step: Wait for price to repair trend and relative strength before considering entry.

watchlist.reason: below 200DMA; underperforming SPY over 63D; negative 63D momentum; drawdown greater than 12%
watchlist.next_step: Wait for price to repair trend and relative strength before considering entry.

methodology.formula: SPY close vs 50DMA/200DMA; 63D and 252D total return.
methodology.rationale: Trend and time-series momentum are used as empirical regime filters; the dashboard uses them as trade-permission gates, not forecasts.
methodology.evidence_reference: Hurst, Ooi, Pedersen, A Century of Evidence on Trend-Following Investing; Moskowitz, Ooi, Pedersen, Time Series Momentum.
methodology.failure_rule: If history is insufficient or the source fails, the module is marked Unavailable and excluded from the regime score.

methodology.formula: 20D annualized realized volatility = stdev(log returns, 20) * sqrt(252); VIX percentile vs 1Y history; SPY drawdown vs 63D high.
methodology.rationale: Volatility determines risk budget. Higher realized or implied volatility reduces permitted position size.
methodology.primary_source: Yahoo Finance chart API, Cboe VIX via Yahoo symbol ^VIX
methodology.evidence_reference: Cboe VIX methodology; volatility-managed portfolio literature.
methodology.failure_rule: If volatility cannot be computed, the module is marked Unavailable and no synthetic volatility is inserted.

methodology.formula: High Yield OAS current level, 3Y z-score, and 20-observation change.
methodology.rationale: Widening high-yield spreads indicate deteriorating credit risk appetite and reduce equity risk permission.
methodology.evidence_reference: ICE BofA US High Yield Option-Adjusted Spread definition via FRED.
methodology.failure_rule: If FRED data is unavailable, credit stress is marked Unavailable and not estimated.

methodology.rationale: Positive NFCI values indicate tighter-than-average financial conditions; tightening conditions reduce risk permission.
methodology.evidence_reference: Chicago Fed National Financial Conditions Index documentation.
methodology.failure_rule: If NFCI data is unavailable, the module is marked Unavailable.

methodology.formula: Total, equity, and index put/call ratios with trailing percentile rank.
methodology.rationale: Put/call extremes identify defensive hedging or speculative crowding; used as context, not a direct signal.
methodology.evidence_reference: Cboe daily market statistics; AAII sentiment indicator guidance.
methodology.failure_rule: If Cboe CSV parsing fails, options data is marked Unavailable.

methodology.formula: AAII bullish percentage minus bearish percentage, validation required.
methodology.rationale: AAII survey is used only as contrarian context and never as a standalone trading trigger.
methodology.evidence_reference: AAII survey documentation and caveat that sentiment should not be used in isolation.
methodology.failure_rule: If bullish/neutral/bearish percentages cannot be validated, the module is marked Unavailable.

methodology.formula: Shiller CAPE current value and percentile when source history is available.
methodology.rationale: CAPE is long-horizon allocation context, not a short-term trade timer.
methodology.evidence_reference: Cyclically adjusted price-to-earnings ratio / Shiller CAPE literature.
methodology.failure_rule: If CAPE cannot be parsed and validated, valuation is marked Unavailable.

methodology.formula: Ticker trend vs 50DMA/200DMA, 63D return, relative strength vs SPY, 20D realized volatility, 63D drawdown, and volatility-adjusted size.
methodology.rationale: Ranks symbols by observable trend, relative strength, volatility, and damage control.
methodology.evidence_reference: Momentum, relative strength, trend-following, and volatility risk-budgeting literature.
methodology.failure_rule: If a ticker has insufficient history, its status is Unavailable and size is 0x.
